rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns residential property tax exemptions. Educ. Code §12.1167 governs charter school related-party transaction appraisals. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: The commissioner may adopt rules to require an open-enrollment charter school to:
_note: No conflict. The two provisions address unrelated policy areas—property tax homestead exemptions versus charter school related-party transaction oversight.
